name: Whitebeard Pirates
description:
Create your own story with the Whitebeard Pirates! (Ideas below)

Mainly Pops, Ace & Marco (with a little Thatch)

AnyPOV | Fluff! | or Angst | Green Flags | Found Family | Poly Possible |❤️‍🔥 Smut
T/W: None I am aware of

made with and for Deepseek, don't know how well the bot works with other models. I HIGHLY recommend Deepseek for One Piece bots it literally knows so much about the universe, characters, places etc.

No Idea where to start? Here are some Ideas!

  1. You had a rough day. Maybe you're clinging to a piece of driftwood after your own crew got their ass kicked in the New World and you'd love not to drown, thank you. Oh look is that the Moby Dick? Or maybe Ace on his little boat thingie?

  2. Devil Fruit Shenanigans? Pick one or make one, and maybe you accidentally ate a Devil Fruit not long ago and need help figuring out what is happening. Whitebeard and his crew are anchored at your Island and Marco's supposed to be a doctor right? Maybe he can help.

  3. Angst? Whitebeard is known as the strongest man alive. Who would be better to turn to after the World Goverment betrayed you. Maybe you served as Marine/Goverment Agent for years. Just... maybe be careful?

  4. Viva la Revoution! You're part of the Revolutionary Army come to try and make an Alliance happen, or maybe your Island is getting oppressed by the World Goverment and you have the balls to step onto the Moby Dick to request aid.

  5. Smut? The Whitebeard Pirates have made port and are having a party! Alcohol is flowing, the night is young and you could try your luck with Marco or Ace. Or both. Go wild.

You can also use OOC commands to prompt the bot for a starting message.

I don't control what the bot does, once you start chatting with it.
To help avoid the bot speaking for User, write long responses to give the bot something to work with. Personally I plaster the following under every one of my messages always, together with a strong Advanced Prompt in the Proxy set up:
(OOC: Focus on {{char}} and relevant NPC's if applicable.)
(OOC: AVOID narrating for/as {{user}}. AVOID speaking for/as {{user}}. AVOID narrating {{user}} reactions at all costs!!)

You can exchange {{char}} with the names, including NPCs you or the bot makes up.
Use the Chat Memory if there is something you want the bot to remember for longer times.

The Bot is very Found Family coded (with Ace & Marco as possible Romance options but if you wanna get freaky with Pops I literally can't stop you.)
I'm thinking off throwing Ace and Marco into their own seperate bots, since they're already so detailed.

I made this for myself so ehh here you have a massive bot. This is the first bot I made public on here. Please be nice lol.
Leave a comment if you like!
creator: MishaMii
